name: shop-coin-and-music
description: Verify Heroic Adventure music plays in Studio and every Coin-priced shop card uses the supplied transparent coin image instead of the square atlas crop.

steps.label: wait for music and shop art

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local S=game:GetService('SoundService') local p=game.Players.LocalPlayer local g=p.PlayerGui:WaitForChild('PunchWallHUD') local a=g:WaitForChild('PunchWallClientAutomation') local music=S:FindFirstChild('Hero Forest Music') local before=music and music.TimePosition or 0 task.wait(1.1) local after=music and music.TimePosition or 0 local musicOk=music~=nil and music.SoundId=='rbxassetid://1837768082' and music.IsLoaded and music.IsPlaying and music.TimeLength>100 and after>before+.5 and music.Volume>=.2 and music:GetAttribute('MusicLoaded')==true local iconId='rbxassetid://72320637874093' local icons,failures=0,{} a:Invoke('OpenTab','Fists') for _,page in ipairs({'Fists','Boosts'}) do a:Invoke('OpenShopPage',page) task.wait(.35) local shop=g.GameMenu.FunctionalHeroShop for _,card in ipairs(shop:GetChildren()) do if card:IsA('Frame') and card.Name:match('ShopCard$') then local icon=card:FindFirstChild('PriceIcon') icons+=1 if not icon or not icon:IsA('ImageLabel') or icon.Image~=iconId or not icon.IsLoaded or icon.ImageRectSize~=Vector2.zero or icon.BackgroundTransparency<1 or icon:GetAttribute('ThemeIcon')~=nil then table.insert(failures,card.Name) end end end end return H:JSONEncode({ok=musicOk and icons==8 and #failures==0,musicOk=musicOk,isPlaying=music and music.IsPlaying,isLoaded=music and music.IsLoaded,timeLength=music and music.TimeLength,advanced=after-before,volume=music and music.Volume,icons=icons,failures=failures})

steps.label: music advances and transparent coin icons render
